title: The Souler Opposite
review_summary: A hilarious original love story with perfect slapstick humor, strong performances especially by Chris Meloni; offers hopeful insights into overcoming adversity through comedy.

title: Angels in the Outfield
review_summary: A sequel surpasses its predecessor with better special effects, plot, writing; engaging both kids and adults without being a Taxi reunion. Danny Glover's performance adds charm as "Al the head angel". Highly recommended viewing even if only watched initially.

title: The Necro Files
review_summary: A hilarious blend of poor effects with great acting from Gary Browning elevates an otherwise questionable scary flick into a highly recommended comedy-horror experience.
